title: Gemma 4 transfer protocol (post-parity)
goal: Define a controlled Gemma 4 transfer protocol that reuses Gemma 3 methodology artifacts without changing defaults until transfer gates pass.
constraints: Gemma 4 transfer runs must be tagged as experimental and non-default.
Transfer gate thresholds must be at least as strict as Gemma 3 parity acceptance gates.
Protocol must include rollback-to-Gemma-3 methodology path if transfer fails.
definition_of_done: Transfer checklist defines exact prerequisites before running Gemma 4 sweeps.
Transfer gate artifact encodes pass/fail thresholds and decision logic.
Protocol test validates gate evaluation and fallback-to-Gemma-3 behavior.
rollback_note: If Gemma 4 transfer signals regressions, stop transfer experiments and continue with Gemma 3 calibrated profiles as the sole default.
